catastrophic_backtracking.description: Regular expression denial of service -- send input that triggers exponential backtracking in vulnerable regex patterns

probes.description: Classic ReDoS probe -- 30+ repeated chars followed by non-matching char. Triggers exponential backtracking on patterns like (a+)+$ or (a|aa)+$. Detect via response time >5s.
Character class ReDoS -- triggers backtracking in patterns with nested character classes like [a-zA-Z0-9_]+ on bracket-heavy input
Email validation ReDoS -- long domain with many dots triggers backtracking in common email regex patterns
